ChangeRequest.name: Input information for Source of encumbrance for loans (according to AnaCredit) is missing
ChangeRequest.comment:
AnaCredit requirement for Source of encumbrance is missing in the LDM.
**\[Update for AE requirements\]**
Information about the Source of encumbrance is required in F 32.03.a, F 32.04.b, F 34.00.b/c, F 35.00.a/b/d, F 36.01.a, F 36.02.a.
The possible values for the source of encumbrance, as specified in F 32.04.a, are: _Derivatives, Deposits, Debt securities issued, Loan commitments received, Financial guarantee received, Securities borrowed with no cash collateral, Other commitments received._
What is important to underline is that the source of encumbrance should be linked to:
1. The **items that are the source of encumbrance** (listed in F 32.04.a): * _Derivatives_ * _Deposits_ * _Debt securities issued_ * _Loan commitments received_ * _Financial guarantee received_ * _Securities borrowed with no cash collateral_ * _Other commitments received_ 2. The **items that can be encumbered because of the source of encumbrance**: * Assets (Loans and advances, debt securities, equities, others(Cash on hands, Derivatives, Tangible assets, Intangible assets, Tax assets)) * Collateral Received (Loans and advances, debt securities, equities, Derivatives, Immaterial rights, Physical collaterals (real estate, aircraft, ship, property plants and equipment, gold etc.)) * Collateral given (only if the source of encumbrance is Own debt securities issued that are covered bonds or securitisation, please see F 32.03.a), please see collateral received * Own debt instruments issued other than securitisations and covered bonds
